descriptions: Added support for 15+ fuel scripts and seatbelt vehicle-exit locking.
Implemented character-specific KVP saving for stress and settings persistence.
Added new stress effects: steer impairment, health regen nerfs, and damage modifiers.
Refactored stress decay to be time-based for consistent rates.
Fixed laggy radar/altimeter updates for aircraft speedometers.
Improved minimap 'hide-on-foot' reliability via post-load re-assertion.
